YX_HEXAGRAM_POWER.title: Hexagram
YX_HEXAGRAM_POWER.description: Make next random effect to get the best result (The random range takes the maximum value, and the random probablity becomes 100%).
YX_HEXAGRAM_POWER.smartDescription: Make next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:effect|effects} to get the best result (The random range takes the maximum value, and the random probablity becomes 100%).
YX_POLARIS_CITTA_DHARMA_POWER.title: Polaris Citta Dharma
YX_POLARIS_CITTA_DHARMA_POWER.descriptio: All slots in your hand are [gold]Star Point[/gold].
YX_STAR_POINT_POWER.title: Star Point
YX_STAR_POINT_POWER.description:
The third and sixth slots of your hand cards are the default [gold]Star Point[/gold].
The card on [gold]Star Point[/gold] can trigger its [gold]Star Point[/gold] effects if applicable.
YX_STAR_POWER_POWER.title: Star Power
YX_STAR_POWER_POWER.description: Adds additional damage to attacks on [gold]Star Point[/gold].
YX_STAR_POWER_POWER.smartDescription: {Amount:cond:<0?Decreases|Increases} attack damage by [blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue] for cards on [gold]Star Point[/gold].
YX_TEMPORARY_HP_POWER.title: Temporary HP
YX_TEMPORARY_HP_POWER.description:
Increase [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] in the battle.
After the battle, lose [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] (retain at least 1 [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] health).
YX_TEMPORARY_HP_POWER.smartDescription:
Increase [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] in the battle.
After the battle, lose {Amount} [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] (retain at least 1 [red]HP[/red] and [red]Max HP[/red] health).
